title: Meeting CRUD API and UI
description: Implement the Express server, meeting REST API with flat-file persistence, and frontend components for meeting list, detail, form views. Includes seed data and the SPA shell.
designContext: Meeting entity with fields: title (string, required), date (date, required), attendees (string), notes (string). Express server with Helmet, JSON body parsing, CORS, static file serving, and SPA fallback. Flat JSON file persistence in data/meetings.json. Frontend SPA with router, meeting-card, meeting-detail, meeting-form components.
